snippet.title: Apex Legends вАУ Legacy Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Apex Legends: Legacy brings a new form of competition, Arenas. Drop into a new action-packed 3v3 game mode. Sharpen your skills in new, bespoke maps like Party Crasher and Phase Runner. ItвАЩs just your squad and their squad, so hiding isnвАЩt an option.

WeвАЩd wish you luck, but in Arenas, there isnвАЩt any. This is a true test of skill.

Valkyrie, daughter of notorious Titan Pilot Viper, is also joining the Games. Take advantage of her jetpack to own the sky and rain missiles down on your foes. Master the new high-precision Bocek Bow to skewer your opponents and drop into an Olympus thatвАЩs been mysteriously transformed. Plus grab the latest Battle Pass and prove yourself in Ranked.

ThereвАЩs nowhere to hide this season, Legends. Ready to find out if youвАЩre predator or prey? Discover your true nature when Apex Legends: Legacy launches May 4!

Apex LegendsвДҐ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬Ѓ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Origin and Steam.

Learn more about Apex Legends: Legacy: http://x.ea.com/68308
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.

nl-NL.title: Apex Legends вАУ Gameplay-trailer Legacy
nl-NL.description:
Bereid je voor om verder te gaan dan battle royale. Stem morgen om 17:00 CET af om de gameplay-trailer van Apex Legends вАУ Legacy te bekijken en alles te weten te komen over deze nieuwe manier van spelen.
Apex Legends вАУ Legacy introduceert een nieuwe vorm van competitie: Arenas. Stort je in een nieuwe 3v3-spelmodus boordevol actie. Scherp je vaardigheden aan op nieuwe, aangepaste maps, zoals Party Crasher en Phase Runner. Alles draait om jouw squad en hun squad, dus jezelf verstoppen is geen optie.

Stel je geluk op de proef, maar besef: geluk bestaat niet in Arenas. Hier wordt getest hoe goed je echt bent.

Valkyrie, de dochter van de beruchte Titan Pilot Viper, doet ook mee aan de Games. Profiteer van haar jetpack om in de lucht te heersen en het raketten te laten regenen op de tegenstander. Leer alles over de nieuwe zeer nauwkeurige Bocek Bow om je tegenstanders te slim af te zijn en stort je in een Olympus dat een mysterieuze transformatie heeft ondergaan. Download daarnaast de nieuwste Battle Pass en bewijs jezelf in Ranked.

Jullie kunnen je dit seizoen nergens verstoppen, Legends. Wil je weten of je roofdier of prooi bent? Ontdek je ware aard als Apex Legends вАУ Legacy op 4 mei wordt uitgebracht!

Apex LegendsвДҐ is een free-to-play battle royale-spel waarin legendarische personages strijden om glorie, roem en fortuin aan de rand van de Frontier. Speel nu gratis op de PlayStation¬Ѓ4, PlayStation¬Ѓ5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch en pc via Origin en Steam.

ar.title: Ў•ЎєўДЎІўЖ Ў£Ў≥ўДўИЎ® ўДЎєЎ® Apex Legends вАУ Legacy
ar.description:
ЎІЎ≥Ў™ЎєЎѓ ўДўДЎІўЖЎЈўДЎІўВ Ў•ўДўЙ ўЕЎІ Ў®ЎєЎѓ ўЕЎєЎ±ўГЎ© Ў®ЎІЎ™ўД Ў±ўИўКЎІўД. Ў™ЎІЎ®ЎєўЖЎІ ЎЇЎѓўЛЎІ ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎєЎ© 8 ЎµЎ®ЎІЎ≠ўЛЎІ Ў®ЎІўДЎ™ўИўВўКЎ™ ЎІўДЎ®ЎІЎ≥ўКўБўКўГўК ўДўЕЎіЎІўЗЎѓЎ© Ў•ЎєўДЎІўЖ Ў£Ў≥ўДўИЎ® ўДЎєЎ® Apex Legends вАУ Legacy ўИЎ™ЎєЎ±ўСўБ ЎєўДўЙ ўГўД ЎіўКЎ° ЎєўЖ ЎЈЎ±ўКўВЎ© ЎІўДўДЎєЎ® ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓЎ© ўЗЎ∞ўЗ.
Ў™ўВЎѓўСўЕ Apex Legends вАУ Legacy ЎіўГўДЎІўЛ ЎђЎѓўКЎѓўЛЎІ ўДўДўЕўЖЎІўБЎ≥Ў©: ЎІўДЎ≠ўДЎ®ЎІЎ™. ЎІўЖЎЈўДўВ ўБўК ўЖўЕЎЈ ўДЎєЎ® 3 ЎґЎѓ 3 ЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ўЕўДўКЎ° Ў®ЎІўДЎ≠Ў±ўГЎ©. ЎІЎіЎ≠Ў∞ ўЕўЗЎІЎ±ЎІЎ™ўГ ўБўК ЎІўДЎЃЎ±ЎІЎ¶ЎЈ ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓЎ© ЎІўДўЕЎЃЎµЎµЎ© ўЕЎЂўД Party Crasher ўИPhase Runner. ЎІўДЎ£ўЕЎ± Ў®ўКўЖ ўБЎ±ўВЎ™ўГ ўИўБЎ±ўВЎ™ўЗўЕ ўБЎ≠Ў≥Ў®ЎМ ўДЎ∞ўДўГ ўДўЖ ўКўГўИўЖ ЎІўДЎІЎЃЎ™Ў®ЎІЎ° ЎЃўКЎІЎ±ўЛЎІ ўЕўЕўГўЖўЛЎІ.

ўЖўИўСЎѓ Ў£ўЖ ўЖЎ™ўЕўЖўЙ ўДўГ Ў≠ЎЄўЛЎІ ЎЈўКЎ®ўЛЎІЎМ ўИўДўГўЖ ўБўК ЎІўДЎ≠ўДЎ®ЎІЎ™ЎМ ўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎѓ ўЕЎђЎІўД ўДўДЎ≠ЎЄ. Ў•ўЖўЗ ЎІЎЃЎ™Ў®ЎІЎ± Ў≠ўВўКўВўК ўДўДўЕўЗЎІЎ±Ў©.

Ў™ўЖЎґўЕ ўБЎІўДўГЎ±ўКЎМ ЎІЎ®ўЖЎ© ЎЈўКЎІЎ± ЎІўДЎҐўДўКўКўЖ ЎІўДЎіўЗўКЎ± ўБЎІўКЎ®Ў± Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ£ўДЎєЎІЎ® Ў£ўКЎґўЛЎІ. ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўБЎѓ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎ≠Ў±ўСўГ ЎІўДўЖўБўСЎІЎЂ ЎІўДЎЃЎІЎµ Ў®ўЗЎІ ўДўДўЗўКўЕўЖЎ© ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ≥ўЕЎІЎ° ўИЎ•ЎЈўДЎІўВ ўИЎІЎ®ўД ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўВЎ∞ЎІЎ¶ўБ ЎєўДўЙ ЎЃЎµўИўЕўГ. Ў£Ў™ўВўЖ ЎІЎ≥Ў™ЎЃЎѓЎІўЕ ўВўИЎ≥ Bocek ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ЎІўДЎєЎІўДўК ЎІўДЎѓўВЎ© ўДўДўВЎґЎІЎ° ЎєўДўЙ ЎЃЎµўИўЕўГЎМ ўИЎІўЖЎ™ўВўД Ў•ўДўЙ ЎЃЎ±ўКЎЈЎ© Olympus ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў™Ў≠ўИўСўДЎ™ Ў®ЎµўИЎ±Ў© ЎЇЎІўЕЎґЎ©. Ў®ЎІўДЎ•ЎґЎІўБЎ© Ў•ўДўЙ Ў∞ўДўГЎМ ЎІЎ≠ЎµўД ЎєўДўЙ Ў£Ў≠ЎѓЎЂ Battle Pass ўИЎ£ЎЂЎ®Ў™ ЎђЎѓЎІЎ±Ў™ўГ ўБўК Ranked.

ўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎѓ ўЕўГЎІўЖ ўДўДЎІЎЃЎ™Ў®ЎІЎ° ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДўЕўИЎ≥ўЕЎМ Ў£ўКЎ™ўЗЎІ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥ЎІЎЈўКЎ±. ўЗўД Ў£ўЖЎ™ ўЕЎ≥Ў™ЎєЎѓ ўДЎІўГЎ™ЎіЎІўБ ўЕЎІ Ў•Ў∞ЎІ ўГўЖЎ™ ўЕўБЎ™Ў±Ў≥ўЛЎІ Ў£ўЕ ўБЎ±ўКЎ≥Ў©ЎЯ ЎІўГЎ™ЎіўБ ўЕЎєЎѓўЖўГ ЎІўДЎ≠ўВўКўВўК ЎєўЖЎѓ Ў•ЎµЎѓЎІЎ± Apex Legends вАУ Legacy ўБўК 4 ўЕЎІўКўИ!

Apex LegendsвДҐвАО ўЗўК ўДЎєЎ®Ў© ўЕЎєЎІЎ±ўГ ўЕЎђЎІўЖўКЎ© Ў≠ўКЎЂ Ў™Ў™ўВЎІЎ™ўД ЎіЎЃЎµўКЎІЎ™ Ў£Ў≥ЎЈўИЎ±ўКЎ© Ў®Ў≠ЎЂўЛЎІ ЎєўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎђЎѓ ўИЎІўДЎіўЗЎ±Ў© ўИЎІўДЎЂЎ±ўИЎ© ЎєўДўЙ Ў£ЎЈЎ±ЎІўБ Frontier. ЎІўДЎєЎ® Ў®ЎІўДўЕЎђЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎҐўЖ ЎєўДўЙ PlayStation¬Ѓ 4ЎМ ўИPlayStation 5ЎМ ўИXbox OneЎМ ўИXbox Series X|SЎМ ўИNintendo SwitchЎМ ўИЎІўДўГўЕЎ®ўКўИЎ™Ў± ЎІўДЎіЎЃЎµўК ўЕўЖ ЎЃўДЎІўД Origin ўИSteam.

en.title: Apex Legends вАУ Legacy Gameplay Trailer
en.description:
Apex Legends: Legacy brings a new form of competition, Arenas. Drop into a new action-packed 3v3 game mode. Sharpen your skills in new, bespoke maps like Party Crasher and Phase Runner. ItвАЩs just your squad and their squad, so hiding isnвАЩt an option.

WeвАЩd wish you luck, but in Arenas, there isnвАЩt any. This is a true test of skill.

Valkyrie, daughter of notorious Titan Pilot Viper, is also joining the Games. Take advantage of her jetpack to own the sky and rain missiles down on your foes. Master the new high-precision Bocek Bow to skewer your opponents and drop into an Olympus thatвАЩs been mysteriously transformed. Plus grab the latest Battle Pass and prove yourself in Ranked.

ThereвАЩs nowhere to hide this season, Legends. Ready to find out if youвАЩre predator or prey? Discover your true nature when Apex Legends: Legacy launches May 4!

Apex LegendsвДҐ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬Ѓ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Origin and Steam.

Learn more about Apex Legends: Legacy: http://x.ea.com/68308
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#ApexArenas #ApexLegacy #ApexLegends

Valkyrie, daughter of notorious Titan Pilot Viper joins the Games. Take advantage of her jetpack to own the sky and rain missiles down on your foes. Master the new high-precision Bocek Bow to skewer your opponents and drop into an Olympus mysteriously transformed. Plus grab the latest Battle Pass and prove yourself in Ranked.

And get ready to go beyond battle royale. 

Apex LegendsвДҐ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on Xbox One, PS4, and Origin and Steam for PC.

ar.description:
"ўЕЎІ ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКЎ≠ЎѓўСЎѓ Ў•Ў±ЎЂ ЎІўДЎ®ЎЈўД ЎІўДЎ≠ўВўКўВўКЎЯ  Ў™ЎІЎ®ЎєўЖЎІ ЎЇЎѓўЛЎІ ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎєЎ© 8 ўЕЎ≥ЎІЎ°ўЛ Ў®ЎІўДЎ™ўИўВўКЎ™ ЎІўДЎ®ЎІЎ≥ўКўБўКўГўК ўДўЕЎіЎІўЗЎѓЎ© Ў•ЎєўДЎІўЖ Ў•ЎµЎѓЎІЎ± Apex Legends вАУ LegacyЎМ ўИЎІўГЎ™ЎіўБ ўЕЎІ Ў•Ў∞ЎІ ўГЎІўЖ ўДЎѓўКўГ ўЕЎІ ўЗўИ ўЕЎЈўДўИЎ® ўДўДўЖЎђЎІЎ© ЎєўЖЎѓўЕЎІ ўДЎІ ўКўГўИўЖ ўЗўЖЎІўДўГ ўЕўГЎІўЖ ўДўДЎІЎЃЎ™Ў®ЎІЎ° Ў®ўЗ.
ўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎѓ ўЕўГЎІўЖ ўДўДЎІЎЃЎ™Ў®ЎІЎ° ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДўЕўИЎ≥ўЕЎМ Ў£ўКЎ™ўЗЎІ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥ЎІЎЈўКЎ±. ўЗўД Ў£ўЖЎ™ ўЕЎ≥Ў™ЎєЎѓ ўДЎІўГЎ™ЎіЎІўБ ўЕЎІ Ў•Ў∞ЎІ ўГўЖЎ™ ўЕўБЎ™Ў±Ў≥ўЛЎІ Ў£ўЕ ўБЎ±ўКЎ≥Ў©ЎЯ ЎІўГЎ™ЎіўБ ўЕЎєЎѓўЖўГ ЎІўДЎ≠ўВўКўВўК ЎєўЖЎѓ Ў•ЎµЎѓЎІЎ± Apex Legends вАУ Legacy ўБўК 4 ўЕЎІўКўИ!

Ў™ўЖЎґўЕ ўБЎІўДўГЎ±ўКЎМ ЎІЎ®ўЖЎ© ЎЈўКЎІЎ± ЎІўДЎҐўДўКўКўЖ ЎІўДЎіўЗўКЎ± ўБЎІўКЎ®Ў± Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ£ўДЎєЎІЎ®. ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўБЎѓ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎ≠Ў±ўСўГ ЎІўДўЖўБўСЎІЎЂ ЎІўДЎЃЎІЎµ Ў®ўЗЎІ ўДўДўЗўКўЕўЖЎ© ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ≥ўЕЎІЎ° ўИЎ•ЎЈўДЎІўВ ўИЎІЎ®ўД ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўВЎ∞ЎІЎ¶ўБ ЎєўДўЙ ЎЃЎµўИўЕўГ. Ў£Ў™ўВўЖ ЎІЎ≥Ў™ЎЃЎѓЎІўЕ ўВўИЎ≥ Bocek ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ЎІўДЎєЎІўДўК ЎІўДЎѓўВЎ© ўДўДўВЎґЎІЎ° ЎєўДўЙ ЎЃЎµўИўЕўГЎМ ўИЎІўЖЎ™ўВўД Ў•ўДўЙ ЎЃЎ±ўКЎЈЎ© Olympus ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў™Ў≠ўИўСўДЎ™ Ў®ЎµўИЎ±Ў© ЎЇЎІўЕЎґЎ©. Ў®ЎІўДЎ•ЎґЎІўБЎ© Ў•ўДўЙ Ў∞ўДўГЎМ ЎІЎ≠ЎµўД ЎєўДўЙ Ў£Ў≠ЎѓЎЂ Battle Pass ўИЎ£ЎЂЎ®Ў™ ЎђЎѓЎІЎ±Ў™ўГ ўБўК Ranked.

ўИЎІЎ≥Ў™ЎєЎѓ ўДўДЎІўЖЎЈўДЎІўВ Ў•ўДўЙ ўЕЎІ Ў®ЎєЎѓ ўЕЎєЎ±ўГЎ© Ў®ЎІЎ™ўД Ў±ўИўКЎІўД. 

Apex LegendsвДҐвАО ўЗўК ўДЎєЎ®Ў© ўЕЎєЎІЎ±ўГ ўЕЎђЎІўЖўКЎ© Ў≠ўКЎЂ Ў™Ў™ўВЎІЎ™ўД ЎіЎЃЎµўКЎІЎ™ Ў£Ў≥ЎЈўИЎ±ўКЎ© Ў®Ў≠ЎЂўЛЎІ ЎєўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎђЎѓ ўИЎІўДЎіўЗЎ±Ў© ўИЎІўДЎЂЎ±ўИЎ© ЎєўДўЙ Ў£ЎЈЎ±ЎІўБ Frontier. ЎІўДЎєЎ® ўЕЎђЎІўЖўЛЎІ ЎІўДЎҐўЖ ЎєўДўЙ Xbox OneЎМ ўИPS4ЎМ ўИOrigin ўИSteam ўДўДўГўЕЎ®ўКўИЎ™Ў± ЎІўДЎіЎЃЎµўК.

snippet.title: Se DESMAYA anunciando que DINAMARCA suspende la vacunaci√≥n con ASTRAZENECA | RTVE Noticias
snippet.description:
Tania Ericksen, la directora de la Agencia del Medicamento danesa, se desmay√≥ en plena rueda de prensa cuando se anunciaba que  Dinamarca suspende la vacunaci√≥n con AstraZeneca a sus ciudadanos.

La Direcci√≥n General de Sanidad danesa considera que existen otras vacunas en el mercado para continuar inmunizando a su poblaci√≥n, cuando la situaci√≥n epidemiol√≥gica en el pa√≠s esta actualmente bajo control, con una incidencia acumulada estable en torno a los 129 casos por cada 100.000 habitantes en los √Їltimos 14 d√≠as. Hasta el momento, el grueso de las vacunas administradas en el pa√≠s corresponden a la vacuna de Pfizer/BioNTech, basada en ARNm, pero no han descartado la posibilidad de volver a utilizarla en el futuro, si la pandemia empeorara poniendo en riesgo al sistema sanitario.

snippet.title: Justin Bieber - Live from Paris (Livestream)
snippet.description:

This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into JustinвАЩs world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

snippet.title: Ricardo Montaner, Juan Luis Guerra 4.40 - Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso
snippet.description:
Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso рЯТНрЯСЂ
Ricardo Montaner y Juan Luis Guerra (Video Oficial)
--
Dios as√≠ lo quiso la hicimos en el estudio, est√°bamos reunidos los hermanos David y Jonathan Julca, Camilo Echeverri, Yasmil Marrufo y yo, y empez√≥ a surgir algo que no tenia ni un porqu√©, ni la ten√≠amos muy clara de lo que est√°bamos buscando. Sab√≠amos que lo que yo quer√≠a era una canci√≥n de amor de pareja siguiendo los fundamentos de este √°lbum dedicado al amor, del sentimiento profundo que una persona puede tener por su pareja. вАЬDios as√≠ lo quisoвАЭ es una canci√≥n de amor, que con el correr del tiempo fue tomando esta cadencia como de cumbia que me llevaba si o si al Caribe. Una vez que le mont√© la voz todos me dec√≠an: esta canci√≥n a d√Їo  con Juan Luis ser√≠a espectacular.

¬њPorqu√© Juan Luis? 
Primero porque soy un fan de toda la m√Їsica de Juan Luis. Lo conozco de hace mucho y es un hermano que mi familia y yo queremos mucho. Por otro lado, √©l ha hecho una espectacular carrera y su legado musical va a ser eterno. Siempre, siempre, la gente me ha comentado: ¬њpara cu√°ndo una canci√≥n con Juan Luis? Yo lo recib√≠a como un ¬њqui√©n sabe?, ¬њcu√°ndo podr√° ser? o lo recib√≠a como: ¬°alg√Їn d√≠a tendr√© una canci√≥n apropiada para hacer con √©l! Pero cuando le mont√© la voz a esta canci√≥n me tom√© el atrevimiento de escribirle, le mostr√© el tema y le dije que so√±aba con poder  hacerla con √©l. Juan Luis no me dej√≥ terminar, literalmente, no me dej√≥ terminar. Me dijo que estaba encantado con la canci√≥n y por supuesto me dijo que s√≠. De ah√≠ en adelante todo transcurri√≥ de maravilla, hasta que Juan Luis mont√≥ voces, me la envi√≥ e hicimos esta edici√≥n de los dos. En tiempo de pandemia fue imposible juntarnos. Pero creo que el resultado es m√°s que obvio. Es una hermos√≠sima canci√≥n de amor que espero toque el coraz√≥n a todo el mundo.
вАФ

localized.title: Ricardo Montaner, Juan Luis Guerra 4.40 - Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso
localized.description:
Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso рЯТНрЯСЂ
Ricardo Montaner y Juan Luis Guerra (Video Oficial)
--
Dios as√≠ lo quiso la hicimos en el estudio, est√°bamos reunidos los hermanos David y Jonathan Julca, Camilo Echeverri, Yasmil Marrufo y yo, y empez√≥ a surgir algo que no tenia ni un porqu√©, ni la ten√≠amos muy clara de lo que est√°bamos buscando. Sab√≠amos que lo que yo quer√≠a era una canci√≥n de amor de pareja siguiendo los fundamentos de este √°lbum dedicado al amor, del sentimiento profundo que una persona puede tener por su pareja. вАЬDios as√≠ lo quisoвАЭ es una canci√≥n de amor, que con el correr del tiempo fue tomando esta cadencia como de cumbia que me llevaba si o si al Caribe. Una vez que le mont√© la voz todos me dec√≠an: esta canci√≥n a d√Їo  con Juan Luis ser√≠a espectacular.

¬њPorqu√© Juan Luis? 
Primero porque soy un fan de toda la m√Їsica de Juan Luis. Lo conozco de hace mucho y es un hermano que mi familia y yo queremos mucho. Por otro lado, √©l ha hecho una espectacular carrera y su legado musical va a ser eterno. Siempre, siempre, la gente me ha comentado: ¬њpara cu√°ndo una canci√≥n con Juan Luis? Yo lo recib√≠a como un ¬њqui√©n sabe?, ¬њcu√°ndo podr√° ser? o lo recib√≠a como: ¬°alg√Їn d√≠a tendr√© una canci√≥n apropiada para hacer con √©l! Pero cuando le mont√© la voz a esta canci√≥n me tom√© el atrevimiento de escribirle, le mostr√© el tema y le dije que so√±aba con poder  hacerla con √©l. Juan Luis no me dej√≥ terminar, literalmente, no me dej√≥ terminar. Me dijo que estaba encantado con la canci√≥n y por supuesto me dijo que s√≠. De ah√≠ en adelante todo transcurri√≥ de maravilla, hasta que Juan Luis mont√≥ voces, me la envi√≥ e hicimos esta edici√≥n de los dos. En tiempo de pandemia fue imposible juntarnos. Pero creo que el resultado es m√°s que obvio. Es una hermos√≠sima canci√≥n de amor que espero toque el coraz√≥n a todo el mundo.
вАФ

Letra:

T√Ї debes ser ingeniera, porque qu√© bien te qued√≥ el puente entre tu boca y la m√≠a
Si hubiera sido por m√≠ ni me atrever√≠a a haberte dado ese beso que me ha cambiado la vida
T√Ї debes ser cirujana porque en el pecho me curaste lo que a m√≠ me dol√≠a
Y me arreglaste el coraz√≥n sin dejarme una herida
¬њDime por qu√© te entregaste a quien no te merec√≠a?

¬њPor qu√© yo si en este mundo hay millones?
¬њPor qu√© yo si tienes tantas opciones?
¬њDime por qu√© conmigo?
Si no tiene sentido
Me gusta que cuando hablas de tu futuro estoy incluido
 
¬њPor qu√© yo si en este mundo hay millones?
¬њPor qu√© yo si tienes tantas opciones?
¬њDime por qu√© conmigo?
Si yo no te merezco
Porque al hombre perfecto yo ni un poquito me le parezco
 
¬њDime por qu√© yo yo yo yo yo?
Si hay millo-llo-llo-llones millones
¬њAy dime por qu√© yo yo yo yo?
Si hay millones, millones
 
Por ti me veo las series que no me gustan
Te pido en Uber Eats lo que te gusta
Y dejo que t√Ї elijas la temperatura
Aunque se me congelen el pelo y las u√±as
 
Yo por ti todo lo apuesto
T√Ї brillas diferente al resto
Para siempre t√Ї tendr√°s el primer puesto
 
T√Ї conoces todos mis defectos
Estabas cuando no hubo presupuesto
Contigo yo me fui a la cima
T√Ї me subes la autoestima
 
Y hasta de mis chistes malos t√Ї te r√≠es (jajajaja)
T√Ї eres mi porrista mi cheerleader

Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/subscribe

#GoldarmGang #Brawlstars #Belle

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвАЩt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвАЩs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвАЩ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвАЩre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support вАФ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:

that's never heard

that's never heard

that's never heard

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. IвАЩve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But itвАЩs wonderful to see that youвАЩre okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвАЩs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel

IвАЩve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And youвАЩre Mr. perfectly fine

Because I hear heвАЩs got his arm вАШround a brand new girl
IвАЩve been picking up my heart

And I never got past what you put me through
But itвАЩs wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
ItвАЩs the best seat
In the best room
Oh, heвАЩs so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And itвАЩs really such a shame
ItвАЩs such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now IвАЩm Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe youвАЩll miss me
But by then youвАЩll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвАЩs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвАЩve been Miss misery for the last time
And youвАЩre Mr. perfectly fine
YouвАЩre perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

snippet.description:
Polic√≠a no me mate que yo me paro , busque un lugar donde se vea un poco m√°s claro , por favor no me mate menos en lo oscuro busque un lugar donde yo me sienta seguro .
                         (X 2 ) 

Polic√≠a no me mate por favor , no e echo nada soy inocente acribillar un indefenso no es un acto de valiente menos un orgullo para Duarte tampoco para e presidente tengo amigos en esa instituci√≥n de familia decente .

No se qu√© pas√≥ ese d√≠a , no soy quien para cuestionar pero ya hay una falta y solo queda lamentar solo nos queda recordar esa familia que murio , los mismo poli est√°n quillaoвАЩ y est√°n dolido igual que yo .

Solo Dios puede decir que hacer con nuestras vidas para mi eso fue un error esa es mi √Їnica perspectiva .

Una lluvia de balas que lo acoge de all√° arriba los impactos de proyectiles ocasionan m√Їltiples heridas .

Yo trato de no hacer da√±o busco mi propia protecci√≥n cualquier menor te atraca o te pone en una misi√≥n , con lo valiosa que es la vida no se lleven de la emoci√≥n al fina todo eso viene por la falta de educaci√≥n.

                     вАЬCOROвАЭ
Polic√≠a no me mate que yo me paro , busque un lugar donde se vea un poco m√°s claro , por favor no me mate menos en lo oscuro busque un lugar donde yo me sienta seguro 
                         (X 2)

Ni tatuaje , ni aretes , ni pantal√≥n al civil que se rehusa lo qu√© hay que ponerlo eвАЩ en detenci√≥n antes que en una caja prefiero esa condici√≥n esposado que Dios вАЬ reprenda вАЬ en la goleta en un colch√≥n .

Cualquiera se equivoca d√©jenlo pedir perd√≥n que ni es m√°s desgraciaoвАЩ va querer cometer ese error . Polic√≠a yo me paro , pero es que ya tengo para uno no sabe si es PaвАЩ chequearte o PaвАЩ darte saco de bala.

NamaвАЩ eвАЩ eso en la noticia una se√±ora sale explicando ahog√°ndose no se entend√≠a porque estaba llorado el presidente indignado se le ve√≠a el rojo en los ojos ,destacaba que la vida va por encima de todo habl√≥ lleno de rabia con el dolor en el alma dijo que es obligatorio qu√© hay que hacer una reforma.
Jur√≥ que se har√° justicia tambi√©n nos pidi√≥ que oremos por el dolor de esa familia que a su familiar perdieron .

                    вАЬCOROвАЭ
Polic√≠a no me mate que yo me paro , busque un lugar donde se vea un poco m√°s claro , por favor no me mate menos en lo oscuro busque un lugar donde yo me sienta seguro
